summary: This Akshaya Tritiya, gold purchases in India reached ₹20,000 crore, but physical sales weakened, according to ClearTax's chief executive. Many transactions were made through old gold exchanges, and digital and ETF investments increased.

title: Your credit score may not matter soon. Here’s what AI looks at instead
